title: Powershred® W11C Cross-Cut Paper Shredder
subtitle: Powershred® W11C Cross-Cut Paper Shredder
overview:
Powershred® W11C Cross-Cut Paper Shredder
Ideal cross-cut paper shredder for home offices
Patented SafetyLock disables shredder for added safety protection
Shreds 11 sheets per pass into 5/32 x 1-3/8” cross-cut particles (Security Level P-4)
Also safely shreds staples and plastic credit cards
Shreds for up to 5 minutes before a 20 minute cool down period is needed
4.75-gallon bin with easy lift-off head and integrated handle for hassle-free waste disposal
For personal use
1 year product warranty plus 3 year cutter warranty

title: Powershred® LX65 Cross Cut Shredder
subtitle: Powershred® LX65 Cross Cut Shredder
overview:
Elevated design that brings distinction to any environment
Shreds 10 sheets per pass into 5 /32” x 1-9/16” cross-cut particles (security level P-4)
Also safely shreds staples, paper clips and plastic credit cards
Patented SafeSense Technology stops shredding when hands touch the paper opening for superior protection
Shreds up to 6 minutes before a 20-minute cool down period is needed
6-gallon bin with easy lift-off head
1-year product warranty plus 5-year cutter warranty

title: Fellowes Microshred 62MC Micro-Cut Shredder
subtitle: Fellowes Microshred 62MC Micro-Cut Shredder
overview:
Best micro cut shredder with particles 6x smaller than standard cross-cut
Patented SafetyLock disables shredder for added safety protection
Holds over 80% more paper per gallon than standard cross-cut
Shreds 10 sheets per pass into 7/64”x 25/64” micro-cut particles (Security Level P-4)
Shreds for up to 7 minutes before a 60 minute cool down period is needed
5 gallon bin
18.75”H x 13.75”W x 10.44”D
1 year product warranty and 5 year cutter warranty
For personal use

title: Fellowes Powershred® 73Ci 100% Jam Proof Cross-Cut Shredder
subtitle: Fellowes Powershred® 73Ci 100% Jam
overview:
Shreds 12 sheets of paper per pass into 397 (5/32 x 1-½ ” Security Level P-4) cross-cut particles for enhanced security on highly confidential documents to help keep your information safe. Also shreds staples, credit cards, paper clips and CDs/DVDs
Runs for up to 10 minutes before a cool down period is needed allowing you to complete shredding jobs in one sitting
Patented 100% Jam Proof System eliminates paper jams and powers through tough jobs for frustration-free shredding
SafeSense Technology automatically disables shredder when hands touch the paper opening, helping to protect more than just your identity
Includes 6 gallon pull-out bin with LED bin-full indicator helping to keep shreds contained and reduce mess

1-year product warranty plus 5-year cutter warranty
